# RIID-4657: Control-Plane Ports

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to macos-provider-cli-review](../macos-provider-cli-review.md)

This slice moves the provider-neutral control-plane port contract.

## Moved Surfaces

- `internal/agentbridge/controlplane`
- Provider-runtime and daemon migration documentation
- Public CI for source/reporter ports, runtime registration, heartbeat, file queue claim receipts, availability filtering, and JSONL reports

The root package owns daemon-side ports for registration, heartbeat, claim, cancel-watch, events, and results. Implementations remain local adapters such as memory source/reporter, file queue source, claim receipts, runtime registry, and file reporter.

This slice does not move SaaS plane, task DB plane, supervisor selection, concrete adapters, server HTTP, packaging, infra, secrets, or local machine state.
